title: Jump Ring
description: Adds a Jump Ring giving you permanent Jump Boost when in the Inventory!
body:
# Minecraft Jump Ring Mod Description

This mod introduces a unique item to the game: **the Jump Ring!** This versatile component can be crafted using simple materials and serves various purposes in Minecraft.

The jump ring *Boooooooooooooossssssssstss* you.

## Credits:
- I created this Mod with the [MCreator](https://www.mcreator.net/)
- I created the icon wit Open-AI's [Dall-E 3](https://openai.com/index/dall-e-3/)
